heading: Army National Guard of the United States and Air National Guard of the United States: discharge and withdrawal of Federal recognition of officers absent without leave
label: 14907 Army National Guard of the United States and Air National Guard of the United States: discharge and withdrawal of Federal recognition of officers absent without leave
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in sections 3820(a), (b) and 8820 of this title, prior to repeal by , (c)(2).Pub. L. 103–337, § 1629(a)(2)
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 1, 1996section 1691(b)(1) of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title

children.text: terminate the reserve appointment of the officer; and
withdraw the officer’s Federal recognition as an officer of the National Guard.

children.heading: .—Discharge From Reserve Appointment
children.label: b .—Discharge From Reserve Appointment
children.text: An officer of the Army National Guard of the United States or the Air National Guard of the United States whose Federal recognition as an officer of the National Guard is withdrawn under shall be discharged from the officer’s appointment as a reserve officer of the Army or the Air Force, as the case may be.section 323(b) of title 32
